creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 161403
Move to github and update

With the deprecation of Google Code and Apache Extras,
the code has moved to github.

- Use Github
- Use a newer snapshot that sets the target to Java 1.5
(should be more compatible with newer Java). Bump
port revision accordingly.
- Add the "Beanshell" name to COMMENT, since PORTNAME
is not clear.
- Take over as maintainer.
